title: Cơm Chiên

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 4 cups cooked jasmine rice, day-old and cold (cơm nguội)
½ lb shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 tablespoons dark soy sauce (xì dầu đen)

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Stir-fry the shrimp separately in a little oil until cooked through. Set aside.
Beat the eggs with a little salt until even.
Pour the eggs into a hot oiled pan and scramble quickly.
Add the cold rice into the pan on high heat. Break up any clumps and stir well.
Season the rice with salt, MSG, sugar, dark soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Toss everything together until evenly mixed.
Add the stir-fried shrimp, corn, and peas. Stir to combine well.
Garnish with chopped green onion. Serve hot.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
